name: blacephalon
flavor_texts: It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head. It’s apparently one kind of Ultra Beast.
A UB that appeared from an Ultra Wormhole, it causes explosions, then takes advantage of opponents’ surprise to rob them of their vitality.
text: Blacephalon is the Fireworks Pokémon. It is a fire and ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: beast-boost. Base stats — HP: 53, Attack: 127, Defense: 53, Sp. Atk: 151, Sp. Def: 79, Speed: 107. Evolution line: blacephalon. Lore: It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head. It’s apparently one kind of Ultra Beast. A UB that appeared from an Ultra Wormhole, it causes explosions, then takes advantage of opponents’ surprise to rob them of their vitality.
